c74object.name: ambitap.plate~
c74object.description: Multichannel plate reverb (Dattorro/Griesinger tank). Creation args: . One multichannel signal in (N channels), one out (M channels); channel counts are fixed at construction. Branches (2..8) sets the tank width — 2 is the classic stereo figure-8.

objarg.name: inputs
objarg.description: Number of input channels reverberated into the tank. Fixed at construction.

objarg.name: outputs
objarg.description: Number of decorrelated output channels tapped from the tank. Fixed at construction.

objarg.name: branches
objarg.description: Width of the reverberation tank ring. 2 is Dattorro's original stereo figure-8; more branches add tail density and decorrelation.

method.name: clear
method.digest: Clear the reverb tank and all delay state
method.description: Clear the reverb tank and all delay state.

attribute.name: decay
attribute.description: Tail decay per tank pass (0..1). 1 = freeze: the tank recirculates losslessly (damping still bleeds energy).

attribute.name: damping
attribute.description: In-loop high-frequency damping (0..1). 0 = bright/undamped; larger values darken the tail faster.

attribute.name: bandwidth
attribute.description: Input band-limiting one-pole (0..1). 1 = full bandwidth into the tank; lower values pre-darken the input.

attribute.name: diffusion
attribute.description: Master diffusion scale (0..1.3) applied to the paper's four allpass coefficients (input 0.75/0.625, decay 0.70/0.50). 1 = Dattorro's values; lower is grainier, higher is denser.

attribute.name: predelay
attribute.description: Pre-tank delay in milliseconds (0..250). Changes glide (brief pitch shift, like any moving delay).

attribute.name: moddepth
attribute.description: Tank-allpass modulation depth in milliseconds (0..2). The paper's 16-sample excursion at 29761 Hz is ~0.54 ms; 0 disables the chorusing.

attribute.name: modrate
attribute.description: Tank-allpass modulation rate in Hz (0..10). Each branch runs a slightly detuned rate so the modulations never phase-lock.

attribute.name: mix
attribute.digest: Equal-power dry/wet mix (0..1, smoothed per sample)
attribute.description: Equal-power dry/wet mix (0..1, smoothed per sample). 1 = wet only. Dry is mapped channel-wise over the first min(inputs, outputs) channels; outputs beyond the input count stay wet-only.
